assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section

outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 60: '### Product Lifecycle'. Line 62: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle'. Line 63: '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT'. Line 64: '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200'. Line 65: '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:'. Line 66: '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'. All 5 required fields are present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Line 74: '### Version Streams'. Line 76: table header '| Stream | Konflux Release Repo | Local Path | Security Matrix Path |'. Line 78: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'. Stream 2.1.x is present with Konflux release repo URL.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Line 80: '### Source Repositories'. Line 84: '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend | upstream |'. Line 85: '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui | upstream |'. Both repositories present with GitHub URLs.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: Line 20: '## Repository Registry' with 2-row table. Line 27: '## Jira Configuration' with 5 fields. Line 35: '## Code Intelligence' with tool naming convention and example. Line 48: '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence. Line 53: '## Bug Configuration' with 3 fields.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Line 53: '## Bug Configuration'. Line 55: '- Bug issue type ID: 10001'. Line 56: '- Bug template: [docs/bug-template.md](docs/bug-template.md)'. Line 57: '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'. All three fields present with correct values.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Line 79: '## Step 10 — Security Configuration'. Line 80: '- User accepted security triage enablement'. Lines 81-97: '- Product Lifecycle fields collected:' followed by all field values including Product pages URL, Jira version prefix, Vulnerability issue type ID, Component label pattern, VEX Justification custom field. Also documents Version Streams (1 stream configured) and Source Repositories (2 repositories configured).

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: Line 5: 'All changes are new additions. The original CLAUDE.md had no Project Configuration section.' Line 9: '### 1. Added `# Project Configuration` section'. Line 13: '### 2. Added `## Repository Registry`'. Line 22: '### 3. Added `## Jira Configuration`'. Line 33: '### 4. Added `## Code Intelligence`'. Line 39: '### 5. Added `## Bug Configuration`'. Line 46: '### 6. Added `## Security Configuration`'. All sections explicitly listed as newly added.
